## ABORTED variable

Sentinel returned when a request is cancelled via [NetworkService.cancel()](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.networkservice.cancel)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
ABORTED: unique symbol
```
